Practice Quiz for Lab Practical Exam 1

  • Due No due date
  • Points 229
  • Questions 229
  • Time Limit None
  • Allowed Attempts Unlimited

Instructions

This quiz has practice questions for Lab Practical Exam 1.

Most are multiple choice - some are fill in the answer.

There is no credit for this quiz - it is meant to serve as a study guide for the first lab practical exam. 

Take the Quiz Again
